steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The first sentence shows residents heavily rely on the transit system; the second reveals that officials work to maintain it. The key signal is the cause-and-effect connection: heavy usage necessitates maintenance efforts.

steps.title: Match to the correct choice
steps.content: ”Accordingly” (meaning “as a result”) fits because it shows how the officials' maintenance efforts logically follow from the heavy reliance just stated. The other three introduce wrong relationships: “Alternatively” presents opposing choices, “For example” presents an illustration, and “However” presents a contradiction. That matches choice A — A is correct.
